office_address: 17119 Sundown Road, Southeast, Calgary, Alberta, P2X3B4
emergency_definition: Calls from regular property managers and general contractors are considered emergencies as determined by Ben
integration_constraints: Needs integration with Jobber (and potentially QuickBooks) for job and quote management.
after_hours_flow_summary: Ben currently handles after‑hours calls; the client is open to using Clara AI to answer after‑hours calls and provide voicemail handling.
office_hours_flow_summary: During business hours calls are routed to schedule appointments, prioritize club‑member customers, and may be escalated to the appropriate technician based on the service request.
questions_or_unknowns: How will Clara filter different types of jobs and schedule them accordingly?
How will the booking feature integrate with the client’s existing Jobber calendar system?
Can exceptions be set up so certain calls go directly to Ben or specific team members?
How will Clara integrate with the current phone number?
notes: Client wants Clara to mention the $115 service call fee only if the customer asks.
